response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and organizing technical workshops
Experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services via microservices and GIS platform
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale infrastructure design
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
